question:
Will Fiorentina vs. Lecce end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 2, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.legaseriea.it/

evidences.title: Wednesday Serie A: Fiorentina Due for Positive Regression vs. Lecce
evidences.content: Since the restart, the results haven't been there for Fiorentina, as they've only earned six of a possible 18 points. However, they won the expected goals battle 8.85 to 7.29 in those matches, so they should habe earned more than six points. Fiorentina is due for some positive regression and I think they have a good chance, playing versus the worst defense in Europe's major leagues. ### Analysis Like most of Lecce's matches, my model predicts this one to be high scoring. My model also suggests there is some value on Fiorentina to grab all three points in the road: Lecce projected odds: +325 (23.52% win probability) Fiorentina projected odds: -127 (55.95%) Draw projected odds: +387 (20.53%) Lecce projected xG: 1.29 Fiorentina projected xG: 2.15 [...] ### Lecce I Giallorossi has not only been the worst defense in Serie A, but they concede more expected goals per match (2.51) than any team across Europe’s major leagues. Things have not improved since the restart, as Lecce have surrendered 15.04 expected goals in their last six matches. They've also been in terrible form in those matches, earning four of a possible 18 points. Despite their terrible defensive record, Lecce isn’t horr...

evidences.title: ALLEGRI: "IT'S AN OPPORTUNITY, WE NEED TO FOCUS"
evidences.content: SUBS"We have plenty of options off the bench. Athekamer can play on the right or left. Pavlović can play left-back. The important thing is to have a good game against Fiorentina. We need to be patient until we have everyone back but keep getting results." THE GROUP"After the Juventus game, we couldn't be happy. When you come away from games that you could've won, and also almost lost in injury time, you need to be angry. If we want to grow, we need to win the games that can be one, and if you can't win, you must not lose. The main thing is that, when we play, everyone does what they need to do." [...] MILAN v FIORENTINA IN THE FIRST GAME BACK"These games after a break are always a mystery, because the players are returning from 15 days away and need to rediscover their focus straight away. Tomorrow's game is the start of a big five-match run, and we need to put in a good display. No matter their standings, Fiorentina are a good side with good players. The boys are ready, and this is an opportunity for us to consolidate our standings." evidences.title: Serie A preview: AC Milan vs. Fiorentina – Team news, opposition insight, stats and prediction
evidences.content: Injuries & suspensions: Jashari, Rabiot, Pulisic, Estupinan, Nkunku. ## The opponents After Raffaele Palladino resigned at the end of the 2024-25 season, despite Fiorentina wanting to keep him, Stefano Pioli was announced as the new head coach in the summer. For La Viola, given the manager’s experience at the club and in Serie A, it was viewed as a very positive arrival. Furthermore, while the experienced Cristiano Biraghi left the club to join Torino, the likes of Jacopo Fazzini, Roberto Piccoli, Simon Sohm and the experienced Edin Dzeko were brought in for a combined €50m to reinforce an already solid team. In short, it looked like it could be a very good reunion for Pioli and Fiorentina. [...] Adding Milan’s injuries to the equation, it feels like it won’t be a walk in the park. Nevertheless, the Rossoneri should bounce back from the Juve draw with a win.
